question: Design a `Book` class with private members for title (string), author (string), and price (double). Include a parameterized constructor to initialize these members and a public method `displayBookInfo()` to print all details.

test_cases.expected:
Title: 1984
Author: George Orwell
Price: $9.50
--- Another Book ---
Title: The Great Gatsby
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
Price: $10.25

errors: The `displayBookInfo()` method has a logical error: it prints the author's name twice and completely omits the book's price. It should print title, author, and price once each.
